assets.prompt: Seamless looping fantasy frontier ambience inside an enormous artificial world: steady high grass wind, distant resonant metal groans from colossal support pillars, faint birds, soft leaf movement, rare low sub-bass machinery pulses, spacious and immersive, no music, no voices, no sudden loud events

Seamless looping ambience for a fortified low-poly fantasy city: distant market activity, soft footsteps on stone, flags and awnings moving in wind, quiet forge hammer far away, subtle wooden signs creaking, safe inhabited atmosphere, no intelligible speech, no music
Clean fast fantasy longsword swing, sharp controlled steel whoosh with a faint crystalline cyan energy trail, close perspective, punchy game sound effect, dry, no impact, no voice

Fantasy sword striking armored hide and stone-like carapace, dense metallic thud, short crack of glassy cyan magic, small debris detail, satisfying action RPG impact, no gore, no voice
Defensive longsword guard blocks a charging creature, hard steel clash, brief low body impact, bright ringing resonance and tiny magical spark, compact action RPG sound, no voice

Large corrupted fantasy boar telegraphing a charge: low threatening snort, hoof scrape on stone and soil, rising chest growl with faint crystalline resonance, readable enemy warning cue, no human voice
